untranslatable_reason: Signal requires peak/trough detection and divergence magnitude measurement across multiple bars with historical comparison. The allowed indicator set does not include prior bar indicator values (prev_rsi_14 does not exist in allowed list), nor does it support the multi-bar peak/trough identification and relative divergence magnitude calculation (0.5% threshold) required by the signal specification. A proper implementation would require custom divergence detection logic beyond the 3-field condition structure.
translation_notes: Divergence analysis fundamentally requires comparing indicator extrema (peaks/troughs) across multiple prior bars and measuring divergence magnitude relative to prior peaks/troughs. The constraint of using only single-bar comparisons with allowed indicators makes precise translation impossible. The attempted translation above uses RSI as a proxy confirming indicator but cannot implement the core divergence detection mechanics (peak/trough identification, magnitude thresholds, bar separation requirements) specified in the original signal.
